## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore (no functional change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔒 Security

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, scenarios covered, screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style (`bundle exec rubocop` is clean).
- [ ] I added/updated tests and the relevant suite passes (`make test` / `yarn test`).
- [ ] No `console.log` / `puts` debug output left behind.
- [ ] User-facing strings use i18n (no hard-coded English in JSX).
- [ ] Migrations are reversible and `db/schema.rb` is re-dumped (if schema changed).
- [ ] API docs regenerated (`make api-docs`) if `api/v1/**` or `app/graphql/**` changed.
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behaviour/architecture changed).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased` (for user-visible changes).
